display.purpose: Hero and section headlines. Used on the public-facing brand site. Dashboard caps at Heading LG.

heading.purpose: Section titles, modal headers, card titles across dashboard and public surfaces.

body.purpose: Default reading text in dashboard tables, paragraphs, and forms.

label.purpose: Button labels, form labels, table header text. Uppercase + tracking reserved for short labels only.

mono.purpose: URL slugs, code snippets, timestamps in data-heavy views.

shadows.name: surface-sm
shadows.purpose: Resting elevation for all card surfaces.

shadows.name: surface-md
shadows.purpose: Hover state for cards; active dropdowns.

shadows.name: surface-lg
shadows.purpose: Elevated panels, mobile drawers, sticky elements.

shadows.name: button-glow-hover
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover glow; deeper and warmer.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Entrance animations, modal panel entry, page element reveals.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Hover transitions, button lift, card border shift.

motion.name: ease-spring
motion.purpose: Micro-interactions (scale bounce on icons, notification badge pop). Used sparingly.

motion.name: ease-smooth
motion.purpose: Default transition easing for state changes (input focus, surface hover).

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Most hover, focus, and state transitions.

motion.name: duration-modal
motion.purpose: Modal backdrop fade, panel scale-fade entry.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary CTA button. Signal Orange background, white text, glow shadow. Used for the single primary action on a panel.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #f97316; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(249,115,22,0.22); cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #ea580c; box-shadow: 0 8px 22px rgba(234,88,12,0.28); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(234,88,12,0.22); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f97316; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action button. White background, Signal Orange text, defined border. Used for non-primary actions alongside a primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: #fff; color: #f97316; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #fff7ed; border-color: #fb923c; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(249,115,22,0.12); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f97316; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Destructive action button. Rose red background, white text. Used for Delete, Remove, Unpublish, Discard.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { background: #ef4444; color: #fff; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; border-radius: 12px; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: #dc2626; } .ds-btn-destructive:active { transform: translateY(0); } .ds-btn-destructive:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #ef4444; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Subtle text-only button for inline actions like Edit, Cancel, View all.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #57534e; padding: 8px 14px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f5f4; } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: #e7e5e4; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f97316; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard text input with orange focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; color: #57534e; outline: none; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #f97316; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(249,115,22,0.15); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #a8a29e; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; background: #f5f5f4; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default content container with defined border and subtle shadow.
components.html:
Card Title
Content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04); transition: box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), border-color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); overflow: hidden; } .ds-card:hover { border-color: #d6d3d1; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(15,23,42,0.05), 0 2px 4px rgba(15,23,42,0.04); } .ds-card-header { padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid #f5f5f4; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; color: #292524; } .ds-card-body { padding: 20px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #57534e; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Pill-shaped status badge. Orange-50 background, Signal Orange text. Variants use emerald (published) / stone (draft) / rose (error) tint, always the same shape.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 4px 12px; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; background: #fff7ed; color: #f97316; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-published { background: #ecfdf5; color: #047857; } .ds-badge-draft { background: #f5f5f4; color: #57534e; } .ds-badge-error { background: #fef2f2; color: #dc2626; }

components.name: Modal Dialog
components.description: Confirmation dialog with semantic backdrop, accessible role attributes, and tone-appropriate icon.
components.html:
Publish this article?

This will make the article visible to the public.
components.css: .ds-modal-backdrop { position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(28,25,23,0.5); padding: 16px; } .ds-modal-panel { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 20px 25px rgba(15,23,42,0.08), 0 8px 10px rgba(15,23,42,0.04); padding: 24px; max-width: 448px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-modal-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-modal-icon-positive { background: #ecfdf5; } .ds-modal-icon-negative { background: #fef2f2; } .ds-modal-content { flex: 1; } .ds-modal-content h2 { font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #292524; margin: 0 0 6px 0; } .ds-modal-desc { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #57534e; line-height: 1.5; margin: 0; } .ds-modal-close { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: #a8a29e; padding: 4px; margin-left: auto; } .ds-modal-close:hover { color: #57534e; } .ds-modal-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 20px; } .ds-modal-confirm { flex: 1; }

components.name: Table
components.description: Data table with bordered container, uppercase stone-500 header, horizontal scroll. No striping.
components.html:
NameStatusDate
Project AlphaCompletedJun 3, 2026
Project BetaPendingJun 1, 2026
Project GammaCancelledMay 28, 2026
components.css: .ds-table-wrapper { overflow-x: auto; border-radius: 16px; border: 1px solid #e7e5e4; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(15,23,42,0.06), 0 1px 2px rgba(15,23,42,0.04); } .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; background: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-table thead { background: rgba(245,245,244,0.5); } .ds-table th { padding: 12px 20px; text-align: left; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #78716c; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-table td { padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 14px; color: #57534e; } .ds-table tbody tr { border-top: 1px solid #f5f5f4; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-table tbody tr:hover { background: rgba(245,245,244,0.4); }

components.name: Sidebar Nav Item
components.description: Dashboard sidebar navigation item. Inactive is stone-500 text on stone-bg; active is Signal Orange 600 background with white text and shadow.
components.html: Dashboard
components.css: .ds-sidebar-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 14px; color: #78716c; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-sidebar-item:hover { background: rgba(231,229,228,0.4); color: #44403c; } .ds-sidebar-item-active { background: #ea580c; color: #fff; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px rgba(249,115,22,0.22); } .ds-sidebar-item-active:hover { background: #ea580c; color: #fff; }

narrative.overview: Sanad's design system is a workspace built from solid surfaces with defined edges — nothing floats, nothing glows, nothing blurs. The analogy is a well-organized workbench: heavy enough to trust, clean enough to think. On the public-facing site, the desk carries brand energy through the orange accent and the typographic scale. On the dashboard, it disappears into the task. The system explicitly rejects SaaS-cliché ornament: gradient mesh backgrounds, glassmorphism, colored side-stripes, glow shadows, and uppercase tracked eyebrows over every section.
keyCharacteristics: Solid, not floating. Every surface has a defined edge (1px border) and rests on the surface below it with a small, precise shadow.
One voice. The orange (#f97316) accent is the only color that carries brand energy. It appears on ≤10% of any given surface.
RTL is structural, not cosmetic. The entire surface mirrors — spacing, motion, hierarchy — for Arabic.
Depth is communicated through solid means: borders, background shifts, and subtle layered shadows.
The tool should disappear. On the dashboard, editors should not notice the interface.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Signal orange is the only brand color. Amber is its secondary gradient partner — not a separate accent. Cyan, emerald, and rose communicate state, not brand.

rules.name: The Restrained Palette Rule
rules.body: Color is state, not decoration. If an element is not interactive, not selected, not in error, and not a primary CTA, it should be stone-neutral.

rules.name: The Flat Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Dashboard surfaces do not use fluid clamp sizes. Font sizes are fixed at the mobile value on screens <1024px and at the desktop value on screens >=1024px.

rules.name: The No-Orphan Rule
rules.body: Long prose uses text-wrap: pretty to reduce widows. Headings use text-wrap: balance.

rules.name: The Flat-at-Rest Rule
rules.body: Shadows are not decorative. At rest, cards carry only the minimal SM shadow. Elevation increases only as a response to interaction or structural hierarchy.

rules.name: The No-Glass Rule
rules.body: No backdrop-blur, no transparency, no gradient overlay as surface treatment. Blur is reserved for modal backdrops only.

dos: Do use Signal Orange for primary actions, current nav selection, and focused inputs only. ≤10% of any given surface.
Do give every surface a defined 1px border.
Do use stone-900 for title text, stone-700 for body text, stone-500 for secondary text.
Do use text-wrap: balance on headings and text-wrap: pretty on long prose paragraphs.
Do pass prefers-reduced-motion: reduce into every Framer Motion component.
Do respect the typographic scale (ratio 1.25) and the fixed breakpoints.
Do use the stone neutral ramp for all non-state surfaces.
Do use semantic HTML with ARIA on modals: role='dialog', aria-modal, aria-labelledby, aria-describedby.
Do match the RTL surface exactly — spacing, motion, alignment — not just mirror layout.
donts: Don't use glassmorphism (backdrop-blur + transparency) as a default surface treatment.
Don't use mesh gradient backgrounds, repeating gradient stripes, or colored page overlays.
Don't use side-stripe borders (border-left/border-right > 1px) on cards, list items, or callouts.
Don't place uppercase tracked eyebrows above every section.
Don't combine 1px solid border with a wide blur shadow (blur >=16px) on the same element.
Don't over-round. Cards top out at 16px; full pill is for badges only.
Don't place placeholder/fake data in production components. Show an em-dash or an empty state.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Use transform and opacity only.
Don't bounce or elastic ease on motion.
Don't use all-caps for body text, sentences, or multi-word labels.
Don't use display font weights (800) in dashboard context.
Don't hard-code shadow or spacing values.
Don't show a modal when an inline or progressive disclosure pattern would serve the user's flow better.
